selections.name: Lonesome Star
selections.reason: Has the benefit of race experience with a solid 2nd last start. The inside barrier is a massive advantage on this tight track.

selections.name: Disco Diamond
selections.reason: Won a recent trial and draws well in barrier 3. Should be able to position prominently.

selections.name: Spinifex Djon's
selections.reason: Finished 2nd in a recent trial. Looks to have some early speed which is crucial here.

selections.name: Pixie Lane
selections.reason: Gets the coveted rail draw. Trialled okay and can save ground all the way.

danger_horse.name: Disco Diamond
danger_horse.reason: Trial winner who could easily cross and lead, which is a winning profile at Ipswich.

selections.name: Hearts Are Better
selections.reason: Class runner of the field dropping significantly in grade. First-up record is solid and trialled well.

selections.name: Jungle Law
selections.reason: Last start winner who draws perfectly in barrier 2. Will be right on the speed.

selections.name: Ikasara
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but has competed in much stronger races down south. Big threat if ready.

selections.name: Beauty Rising
selections.reason: Fitter for the first-up run and gets the inside draw to do no work.

danger_horse.name: Jungle Law
danger_horse.reason: In winning form and maps to get a dream run behind the leaders.

selections.name: Slippin' Jimmy
selections.reason: Ready to peak third-up. Has been racing well in stronger company and looks well placed here.

selections.name: Lubrication
selections.reason: Classy gelding dropping in grade. The inside barrier is a huge plus on this tight circuit.

selections.name: Master Showman
selections.reason: Consistent performer in good races. Fitter now and can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Troika
selections.reason: Second-up and can improve sharply. Maps to get a good run just off the pace.

danger_horse.name: Lubrication
danger_horse.reason: If he jumps cleanly from barrier 1, his class could easily see him dominate this field.

selections.name: Monakeed
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start. Looks ready to break through and the mile suits perfectly.

selections.name: Rusty Tycoon
selections.reason: Forgive last start. Previous form was solid and can bounce back in this lineup.

selections.name: Top Level
selections.reason: Improving with racing and gets the ultimate gear change with the inside draw.

selections.name: Mr Racing
selections.reason: Solid debut effort. Open to natural improvement and from a top stable.

danger_horse.name: Rusty Tycoon
danger_horse.reason: Has the ability to roll forward and dictate terms, which is lethal at Ipswich.

selections.name: Le Chocolat
selections.reason: Impressive winner last start. Looks progressive and can go on with it here.

selections.name: Acapulco Girl
selections.reason: Resuming but has shown good ability in the past. Maps well from the draw.

selections.name: Brave Horatius
selections.reason: Broke through for a win last start. Confidence is up and draws to get a soft run.

selections.name: Shelly's Ace
selections.reason: Gets the inside barrier which is gold here. Can sneak into the placings at odds.

danger_horse.name: Acapulco Girl
danger_horse.reason: Has the class to blow these away if fully wound up for her return.

selections.name: Yeah Copy
selections.reason: Last start winner who is in peak form. Can overcome the wider draw with early speed.

selections.name: He'sgotthesay
selections.reason: Resuming but showed plenty of ability last campaign. Definite threat if right.

selections.name: Heroic Beach
selections.reason: Consistent type who gets the dream run from the inside barrier.

selections.name: Clubhouse
selections.reason: Fitter for the first-up run and drops in class. Can improve sharply.

danger_horse.name: He'sgotthesay
danger_horse.reason: Fresh horse on the scene who could easily outclass these on his best form.

selections.name: The Rookie
selections.reason: Progressive filly who won well last start. Looks to have plenty of upside.

selections.name: Ratenotice
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last time out. Rock hard fit and draws to get every chance.

selections.name: Magic Moz
selections.reason: Broke maiden status last start and gets the inside draw to utilize early speed.

selections.name: She Moves Too
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Has the ability to overcome the tricky draw.

danger_horse.name: Ratenotice
danger_horse.reason: Knocking on the door for a win and maps perfectly to strike.

selections.name: Canara
selections.reason: Racing consistently in stronger grade. The mile suits and draws well.

selections.name: Propose
selections.reason: Last start winner who is flying. Wide draw is a slight concern but has tactical speed.

selections.name: Our Jewel
selections.reason: Solid placing last start and gets a great run from an inside barrier.

selections.name: Fire And Light
selections.reason: Capable of figuring in this grade if able to slot in from the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Propose
danger_horse.reason: In winning form and if she crosses early, she will be very hard to run down.
